name: artisan-marketplace-poc
description: AI-powered marketplace assistant for local artisans - POC

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend-seller && npm install && cd ../frontend-buyer && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.backend:restart: lsof -ti:3001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; npm run backend
scripts.build:all: cd frontend-seller && npm run build && cd ../frontend-buyer && npm run build
